applyForRebate(address,uint64,uint8).details: Requirements:      - The caller must be the bridge contract

params.treasuryFeeType: Type of treasury fee:        - 0: deposit treasury fee,        - 1: redemption treasury fee.

returns._0: Updated fees considering rebate if applicable

cancelRebate(address,uint256).details: Requirements:      - The caller must be the bridge contract

params.index: Index of the element in the array

returns.rebateTreasuryFeeMode: Current mode:         - 0: rebates for both deposits and redemptions,         - 1: rebates for deposits only,         - 2: rebates for redemptions only.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions anymore. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby removing any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._rebateTreasuryFeeMode: New rebate treasury fee mode:        - 0: rebates for both deposits and redemptions,        - 1: rebates for deposits only,        - 2: rebates for redemptions only.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateRebatePerToken(uint256).details: Requirements:      - The caller must be the contract owner

updateRollingWindow(uint256).details: Requirements:      - The caller must be the contract owner,      - The new rolling window cannot be zero

updateUnstakingPeriod(uint256).details: Requirements:      - The caller must be the contract owner

devdoc.title: Contract for staking T token to get rebate on minting/redemption fees

applyForRebate(address,uint64,uint8).notice: Checks if user is eligible for rebate

cancelRebate(address,uint256).notice: Cancels rebate in case of reedem request was timed out

forceStakeTransfer(address,address).notice: Transfers ownership of stake from one address to another

getAvailableRebate(address).notice: Calculates available rebate for the specified user.

getRebate(address,uint256).notice: Returns timestamp and amount of rebate

getRebateCap(address).notice: Calculates cap for rebate for the specified user.

getRebateTreasuryFeeMode(address).notice: Returns the rebate treasury fee mode for a user.

setDelegatee(address).notice: Sets a delegatee for a rebate.

setRebateTreasuryFeeMode(uint8).notice: Sets the rebate treasury fee mode for caller.

stake(uint96).notice: Stake T token to be eligible for rebate
